title: EPA v. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 02-1975-0002: GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY
Type: Civil Judicial Action
Status: Closed
Outcome: Litigated With Penalty
Lead Agency: EPA

Penalties and Costs:
Federal Penalty: $2,000

Laws and Sections Violated:
  CWA: 402: Clean Water Act, 301: NPDES Discharge without a Permit (Other Unpermitted Discharges)

Defendants:
  GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY

Facilities:
  POWEREX INCORPORATED AUBURN PLANT, WEST GENESSEE STREET, AUBURN, NY

Case Milestones:
  06/30/1975: Referred To Dept Of Justice
  01/15/1977: Complaint Filed With Court
  02/08/1977: Final Order Entered
  02/08/1977: Enforcement Action Closed
  02/08/1977: Concluded
  02/08/1977: Final Order Lodged

Pollutants:
  NONE

Enforcement Conclusion #1: Consent Decree or Court Order Resolving a Civil Judicial Action
  Name: GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY
  Settlement Entered: 02/08/1977
  Federal Penalty: $2,000
